zh.lifeSummary: 當Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland於1055年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，他的父親Einudd ap Morien36歲，母親Efa ferch Llywelyn32歲。他於1110年與Gwenllian ferch Rhys在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1134年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland于1055年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾时，他的父亲Einudd ap Morien36岁，母亲Efa ferch Llywelyn32岁。他于1110年与Gwenllian ferch Rhys在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1134年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: compound of iud ‘lord, prince’ + hael ‘generous’; borne in the Mabinogi by the son of Llarian.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland was born in 1055, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Einudd ap Morien, was 36 and his mother, Efa ferch Llywelyn, was 32. He married Gwenllian ferch Rhys in 1110, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1134, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland est né en 1055, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Einudd ap Morien, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch Llywelyn, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Rhys en 1110, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1134, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland(이)가 1055년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einudd ap Morien(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa ferch Llywelyn(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1110년 영국 웨일스에서 Gwenllian ferch Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1134년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland nasceu em 1055, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Einudd ap Morien, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch Llywelyn, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian ferch Rhys em 1110, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1134, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland родился в 1055 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Einudd ap Morien было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch Llywelyn, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Rhys в 1110 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1134 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 79 лет.
